title: Lab 35: Process Priority and Tuned
description: Tune server and adjust the nice level of a long-running process there.

tasks: Install the tuned package if it is not already present and activate the tuned profile throughput-performance on server.
Start the command sleep 3600 in the background on server and save its PID in /root/sleep35.pid.
On server, adjust the nice value of that process so it becomes 5.
hints: Keep the tuning task on server, not client.
Store the PID before changing the nice value.
checks: # server test -f /root/sleep35.pid && ps -o ni= -p "$(cat /root/sleep35.pid)" | tr -d '[:space:]' | grep -qx 5
solution_outline: Enable tuned and set throughput-performance on server.
Launch sleep 3600 in the background and record its PID.
Use renice to move the process to nice value 5.
task_titles: Activate the tuned profile on server
Start the long-running sleep process on server
